rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HARVEY BARTNOF
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Continued to August 7, 2017. A partial inventory was filed, but not a final inventory. No Petition for Approval of Status of Administration has been filed as required by Probate Code section 12200. If the final inventory and the Petition for Approval . . . are both filed no later than Wednesday, August 2, 2017, no appearance will be required on August 7. If not, an appearance will be required. No further continuances will be granted without an appearance.
